entries.definition:
gh–ṣ–ṣ choking, to choke, to be crowded. Of this root, only
غُصَّة ghusṣatun occurs once in the Qur’an.

غُصَّة ghusṣatun [n.] choking (73:13) وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ and food that
causes choking.
